steps.name: Login
steps.description: Click the LOGIN button to authenticate

steps.name: Open Recipe
steps.description: Click RECIPE button to open the connector recipe file

steps.name: Select Image Source
steps.description: Select the image source for vision capture

steps.name: Mold Left Label
steps.description: Click the Mold Left label to activate left mold ROI selection

steps.name: Mold Left ROI
steps.description: Drag to define the mold left region of interest. YOLO26x detects mold_left boundary for automatic start/end coordinates.

steps.name: Mold Right Label
steps.description: Click the Mold Right label to activate right mold ROI selection

steps.name: Mold Right ROI
steps.description: Drag to define the mold right region of interest. YOLO26x detects mold_right boundary for automatic start/end coordinates.

steps.name: Axis Marking
steps.description: Mark the axis reference points for connector alignment

steps.name: Pin Up Check
steps.description: Validate top connector pins (20 pins expected). YOLO26x detects connector_pin in top ROI.

steps.name: Pin Down Check
steps.description: Validate bottom connector pins (20 pins expected). YOLO26x detects connector_pin in bottom ROI.

steps.name: Apply & Open
steps.description: Click APPLY to apply settings, then OPEN to view results
